title: f2b-errors — pre-frozen F2-line failure-cause taxonomy + declared concept-cluster bootstrap re-analysis, a $0 CONSUMER of f2b-transfer Stage-2 logs: a CLOSED six-category cause set (X-EXTRACT / X-NONENGAGE / X-GOLDCONFLICT / X-EXHAUST-STABLE / X-EXHAUST-WANDER / X-OTHER<=2%) with a deterministic assignment tree, orthogonal harmful/benign-flip accounting, and ONE conditional primary: the Stage-2 external-gold lift (if its frozen SAP rejects) survives concept-cluster resampling. Declares the R-2 superset-logging fields Stage-2's harness staging must emit. Runs no model, spends no GPU, and can never flip the frozen f2b-transfer verdict. TIMING-CRITICAL: must freeze before Stage-2 unblinds — a taxonomy declared after outputs are inspected is retrospective storytelling forever (R-2).
hypotheses: H-ROBUST (primary, conditional on the f2b-transfer Stage-2 frozen SAP rejecting its null): the Stage-2 external-gold primary lift is not an artifact of item-level pseudo-replication — under a concept-cluster percentile bootstrap (resample the covered concepts, B=10000, seed 20260710) the one-sided 95% lower bound of effect_size stays > 0 (G6: 250 items over ~108 concepts x 4 templates are not 250 independent units)

H-COMPOSITION (descriptive, no statistical test, never verdict-bearing beyond its gates): Stage-2 kernel-verify-retry failures against blind external gold distribute over the CLOSED pre-frozen taxonomy with residual X-OTHER <= 2%, with harmful-flip (retry destroyed a right attempt-0) and benign-flip accounting and per-(concept, template, seed) cluster keys — so failure narratives are pinned BEFORE any output is seen
H-PRICE (reported-only): the cluster-CI-to-item-CI width ratio measures the pseudo-replication price that every successor F2-line SAP (family replications, rung extensions) must budget for

dependent_vars.name: cause_category_assigned
dependent_vars.definition: first-match category from the ordered deterministic decision tree in poc/f2b-errors/taxonomy.json (implemented verbatim by the pinned analysis script); universe = kernel-verify-retry cells with item_correct_ext_final == 0

dependent_vars.name: harmful_flip
dependent_vars.definition: item_correct_ext_attempt0 == 1 AND item_correct_ext_final == 0 — retry destroyed a right answer; orthogonal to cause category

dependent_vars.name: benign_flip
dependent_vars.definition: item_correct_ext_attempt0 == 0 AND item_correct_ext_final == 1 — the lift's mechanism, accounted over ALL verify cells

dependent_vars.name: primary_effect_cluster_lb
dependent_vars.definition: one-sided 95% concept-cluster percentile-bootstrap lower bound of [acc_ext(verify k=4) - acc_ext(alone)] recomputed from the logged per-item fields (seed-averaged per-item means, mirroring the Stage-2 SAP's estimand)

arms_mandatory_baselines: CONSUMER record — runs NO arms of its own and launches NO model: it is a pure function of f2b-transfer Stage-2 logged final-phase cells (kernel-verify-retry + model-alone at R1) plus the Stage-2 pinned analysis output; the Stage-2 record itself carries the mandatory kernel-as-text-settled, shuffled-kernel, and gloss-self-verify controls — this record inherits, and cannot alter, that control structure

retrospective twin (declared, quarantined): the same procedure over results-log/f2b-replicate.jsonl is phase:'exploratory' (that record is already unblinded) — pricing information only, never confirmatory

n_planned.expected_failure_cells: ~200-450 (depends on Stage-2 accuracies; the assignment-total gate is a point-rate bound, decidable at any n >= 50)
n_planned.bootstrap: B=10000 concept-cluster percentile, PRNG seed 20260710; plus 2000-resample item-level CI for the width-ratio price; plus leave-one-seed-out jackknife (diagnostic)
n_planned.r2_logging_declaration: the required per-cell + per-attempt fields (and arms) are declared machine-readably in poc/f2b-errors/taxonomy.json required_logged_fields; the Opus runner includes them as superset logging when staging the Stage-2 harness (an ops-level logging addition filling the frozen record's PINNED-AT-INPUTS harness_manifest placeholder — it changes no arm, endpoint, or analysis of the FROZEN f2b-transfer design); FALLBACK: R-2 raw per-attempt decoded outputs + verifier decisions persisted content-addressed are sufficient (assignment is a pure function of them); if NEITHER lands, /gates/fields_available fails and this record reads INSTRUMENT-INVALID — it never inspects unblinded outputs to retro-fit
n_planned.timing: freeze BEFORE any Stage-2 GPU cell runs and before any Stage-2 output is inspected (R-2); after unblinding this instrument is permanently non-confirmatory

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

pins.harness_manifest: poc/f2b-errors/taxonomy.json sha256=4326ae11a60f097f24f93b0c26883df823861c022566344d64a72dca8285164c — the CLOSED taxonomy + deterministic assignment tree + R-2 required-logged-fields declaration + declared re-analysis; ANY byte drift in that file after freeze = a new experiment id, never an amendment

endpoints.test: CONDITIONAL cluster-robustness of the Stage-2 primary: evaluated ONLY if /analysis/stage2_primary_reject (echoed fail-closed from the Stage-2 pinned analysis output) is true — else this record reads INCONCLUSIVE by rule (robustness of a lift is undefined without a lift). PASS iff the one-sided 95% concept-cluster percentile-bootstrap lower bound of the recomputed effect_size > 0 (cluster_robust); FAIL iff Stage-2 rejected but the bound is <= 0 (the PASS is pseudo-replication-fragile). NEITHER outcome can flip the frozen f2b-transfer verdict (that verdict is a pure function of ITS frozen SAP); the pre-declared consumer rule is: any claim citing a Stage-2 PASS must co-cite this record's cluster_robust

INSTRUMENT gate: the R-2-declared per-cell + per-attempt fields exist for both consumed arms AND the Stage-2 pinned analysis output is present; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID (the record NEVER falls back to inspecting unblinded raw outputs to reconstruct fields post-hoc)

INSTRUMENT gate: the deterministic tree assigns >= 98% of failure cells to a named (non-X-OTHER) category (point rate; n_failure_cells >= 1) — a larger residual means the closed set does not describe the pipeline and the instrument is invalid; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID

DESCRIPTIVE ONLY (never Holm, never verdict-bearing): the X-GOLDCONFLICT mass — verifier-ACCEPTED (hence canonical-content, mem-correct) yet ext-wrong — is the H-CIRC-diagnostic cell of the composition table; reported with counts

DESCRIPTIVE ONLY: harmful-flip accounting (attempt-0 ext-correct -> final ext-wrong) across all verify cells, with benign-flip accounting alongside; the lens-B requirement that retry harm be visible, not netted away

DESCRIPTIVE ONLY: concept-cluster CI width / item-level CI width — the measured pseudo-replication price to be written into every successor F2-line SAP (f2b-family-replicate, rung extensions) before GPU is spent

kill_criterion_verbatim: f2b-errors kills ($0, CPU-only, consumer of Stage-2 logs): (a) FRAGILITY KILL — the Stage-2 frozen SAP rejected its null but the one-sided 95% concept-cluster bootstrap lower bound of the recomputed external-gold lift is <= 0 => FAIL: the Stage-2 PASS is pseudo-replication-fragile, and the pre-declared consumer rule forbids citing that PASS without this FAIL alongside it at equal prominence; this kills the 'the Stage-2 inference is robust to item clustering' reading, NOT the frozen verdict (which no output of this record can flip). (b) NOT-APPLICABLE — Stage-2's primary did not reject => INCONCLUSIVE by rule; the composition table and flip accounting are still emitted descriptively (failure characterization of a null result is exactly as informative). Degeneracy discipline: missing R-2 fields or a >2% X-OTHER residual are INSTRUMENT-INVALID by pre-registered gates — never FAIL, PASS, or NULL, and never a licence to inspect unblinded outputs and retro-fit categories. The taxonomy file's bytes are frozen with this record: any post-freeze category change is a NEW experiment id.
extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on any verdict. R0 — this record runs no model; scale_language none. Scope: the f2b-transfer Stage-2 pipeline mechanics exactly (string-equality verifier over canonical records with abstention off-coverage, fixed k=4, R1 = SmolLM2-135M host, 250 externally-labelled d-qa-t items over the 108 covered concepts, seeds 0/1/2, blind d-adj-t external gold). A PASS licenses exactly: 'the Stage-2 external-gold lift's sign survives concept-cluster resampling on THIS eval set' — a sensitivity statement about the Stage-2 inference, NOT new evidence for the lift, NOT an audit, NOT any widening of the Stage-2 envelope (which binds verbatim, including its sign-only two-rung scale language and its 0.3542 molecules-v0 coverage restatement — MEASURED by m0b on ONE incomplete kernel-v0 instance, restated mandatorily here). A FAIL licenses exactly: 'claims citing the Stage-2 PASS must carry this fragility finding at equal prominence' and prices concept-clustering into every successor F2-line SAP. The composition table is DESCRIPTIVE: category masses (including X-GOLDCONFLICT, the H-CIRC-diagnostic cell) support NO hypothesis adjudication by themselves — H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC belongs to f2b-transfer's own frozen endpoints alone. The taxonomy does not name causes the logged fields cannot decide (no mapper/axiom/ambiguity categories — this pipeline has no such stages); it extrapolates to NO other verifier design, host, item surface, or corpus. The retrospective f2b-replicate twin is phase:'exploratory', quarantined, uncitable as confirmation.

runner_constraints.gpu: NONE — $0 GPU by design; the ONLY external dependency is the R-2 logging handoff at Stage-2 harness staging
runner_constraints.harness: analysis/f2b_errors.py (mock-green) consuming the Stage-2 per-attempt cell log + the Stage-2 pinned analysis output; both input pins are declared PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholders filled by ops amendment when Stage-2's final-phase rows land and BEFORE this record's final-phase analysis runs
runner_constraints.stage_discipline: freeze BEFORE any f2b-transfer Stage-2 GPU cell launches and before any Stage-2 output is inspected (R-2, design doc section 7.1-7.2); this record's final-phase analysis runs AFTER Stage-2's own verdict-gen, mechanically, with zero discretion
